item.title: How to host a website with nginx

item.title: Contact Me
item.description: 🔗 Github: duncan-f 🔗 Twitter: @duncan12back ✉️ E-mail: fmokhtari@mail.ru You can buy me coffee ☕ here: «««< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD ======= >>>>>>> 7241d5d (Added some shortcuts to handle
